name: Parse sensor
Split to chart points
MQTT Out (data)
Publish Canonical MQTT Live
Final Live Payload
Fault Status Text
Louvre Command
Fan Command
Light Command
heartbeat
func:
flow.set("arduino_last_rx", Date.now());
return msg;

name: comm watchdog
TX Heartbeat
func:
msg.payload = "HEARTBEAT\n";
return msg;

name: Fault Log
Set Mode Auto
Thresholds Display
Format for WS Dashboard
func:
let p = msg.payload;
if (!p || typeof p !== 'object') return null;

let out = {
    temp:          p.temp_f,
    rh:            p.rh_pct,
    tempExhaust:   p.temp_f,
    tempIntake:    p.temp_f,
    rhExhaust:     p.rh_pct,
    rhIntake:      p.rh_pct,
    lux:           p.lux,
    tankTemp:      p.tank_temp_f,
    soilPct:       [p.soil1_pct, p.soil2_pct, p.soil3_pct, p.soil4_pct],
    valveOn:       [p.row1===true, p.row2===true, p.row3===true, p.row4===true],
    rowEnabled:    [p.row1_en!==false, p.row2_en!==false, p.row3_en!==false, p.row4_en!==false],
    pumpOn:        p.pump_on === true,
    lightOn:       p.light_on === true,
    fanPwm:        p.fan_pwm,
    tankHeaterOn:  p.heater_on === true,
    louvreState:   Number(p.louvre_state_raw),
    louvrePos:     p.louvre_pos_pct,
    mode:          p.mode,
    irrigationMode: p.irrigation_mode,
    rowsRunActive: p.rows_run_active === true,
    activeRowIndex: p.active_row,
    tempOpenF:     p.temp_open_f,
    tempCloseF:    p.temp_close_f,
    ecoMode:       p.eco_mode === true,
    pvPresent:     p.pv_present === true,
    battV:         p.batt_v,
    pvV:           p.pv_v,
    tankHeatOnF:   p.tank_heat_on_f,
    tankHeatOffF:  p.tank_heat_off_f,
    scheduleIntervalMs: p.schedule_interval_ms,
    hw:            p.hw || {},
    rhOpenPct:     p.rh_open_pct,
    commFault:     flow.get('arduino_comm_fault') || 0,

    // #4: per-row arrays instead of row1-only scalars
    soilStartPct:  [p.row1_start_pct, p.row2_start_pct, p.row3_start_pct, p.row4_start_pct],
    soilStopPct:   [p.row1_stop_pct, p.row2_stop_pct, p.row3_stop_pct, p.row4_stop_pct],
    rowDurationMs: [p.row1_ms, p.row2_ms, p.row3_ms, p.row4_ms],

    // #6: canonical fault fields from Final Live Payload
    arduinoFault:  p.fault || 0,
    faultCount:    p.fault_count || 0,
    systemFault:   p.system_fault || 0,
    faults:        p.faults || {}
};

msg.payload = JSON.stringify(out);
return msg;

name: WS Command → Serial
Hardware Config
enable control
Publish Compact MQTT Edge
func:
let p = msg.payload;
if (!p || typeof p !== "object") return null;

let out = {
    schema: "greenhouse.edge.v1",
    stream: "edge",
    ts: (typeof p.ts === "number") ? p.ts : Date.now(),
    temp_f: p.temp_f,
    rh_pct: p.rh_pct,
    soil_avg_pct: p.soil_avg_pct,
    lux: p.lux,
    mode: p.mode,
    irrigation_mode: p.irrigation_mode,
    louvre_pos_pct: p.louvre_pos_pct,
    louvre_state: p.louvre_state,
    fan_pct: p.fan_pct,
    light_on: p.light_on === true,
    pump_on: p.pump_on === true,
    heater_on: p.heater_on === true,
    active_row: p.active_row,
    rows_run_active: p.rows_run_active === true,
    rows_run_auto: p.rows_run_auto === true,
    system_fault: Number(p.system_fault || 0),
    fault_count: Number(p.fault_count || 0),
    faults: p.faults || {},
    fallback_used: p.fallback_used === true
};

msg.topic = "greenhouse/data/edge";
msg.payload = out;
return msg;

name: node red status indicator
func:
msg.payload = JSON.stringify({heartbeat: true, ts: Date.now()});
return msg;

name: build schema SQL
parse range params
filter by ts range
check/write csv header
Format for Storage
